description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps 📱!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
Commits:
- flatpak: update metainfo (#5846)
- website: new languages, update some texts (#5849)
- docs: dependencies (#5850)
- core, ui: option to use web port by default for preset servers only (#5847)
- android, desktop: additional information about database errors in console (#5853)
- core: use /feed command in broadcast bot (#5854)
- directory service: fix deleting group registration (#5856)
- ios: refactor chat state (remove chatItemsChangesListener) (#5858)
- ios: deliver notifications even if iOS fails to fire expiration notice, prevent repeat delivery of stale notifications (#5861)
- ios: remove types used only in the app from the framework (#5866)
- core: split response to two types, to improve iOS parsing memory usage (#5867)
- core: pass event and response error without dedicated constructor (#5869)
- ios: deliver notifications instantly when server has no more messages and better concurrency (#5872)
- core: 6.3.4.0 (simplexmq 6.4.0.2)
- ios: update core library
- ui: translations (#5874)
- website: translations, readme: ZEC address (#5875)
- ios: v6.3.4 build 274 (internal release)
- ios: fix XCode 16 regressions (tap not working on files, quotes, images, voice messages, etc.), open link previews on tap (#5880)
- ios: export localizations
- ios: 6.3.4 (build 275)
- ios: only handle taps on messages with links or secrets, use image for secret markdown (#5885)
- ios: unblur media on tap, open/play on the second tap; handle link preview errors (#5886)
- core, ui: support trailing punctuation for mentions, URIs (also support domains), and email addresses (#5888)
- ios: fix taps on reactions, member profile images, selecting items, icons to navigate to found and forwarded items (Xcode 16 regressions) (#5890)
- ui: translations (#5891)
- android, desktop: narrow condition for showing reported count toolbar (to avoid showing it to regular members who received reports due to a bug in older version) (#5894)
- ios: 6.3.4 (build 276)
- website: translations (#5892)
- website: translations (#5896)
- core: make member admission forwards compatible (#5893)
- core: 6.3.4.1
- 6.3.4: ios 277, android 287, desktop 100
